cleanup_policy: remove only token-scoped files under the device output directory
leave app payload stores and unrelated containers untouched
commands: __missing_adb_for_planned_gap_record__ shell run-as io.github.ryo100794.pdocker.compat sh -c 'cd files && test -S pdocker/pdockerd.sock'

kill_at_step_cases.ExpectedRecovery: old committed lower/upper view or a complete atomically published upper entry; no trusted .cow temp
kill_at_step_cases.FailureOracle: fail if lower bytes change, a .cow temp is trusted, or upper shows a partial payload after restart
kill_at_step_cases.GapReason: adb unavailable; external Android daemon/helper kill-at-step evidence remains planned-gap

kill_at_step_cases.ExpectedRecovery: destination is either the old committed file or the complete renamed file; no staged rename is trusted
kill_at_step_cases.FailureOracle: fail if destination mixes old/new content or a staged rename is accepted as committed
kill_at_step_cases.GapReason: adb unavailable; external Android daemon/helper kill-at-step evidence remains planned-gap

kill_at_step_cases.ExpectedRecovery: mode/metadata state is atomic with payload state; metadata-only commits are rejected
kill_at_step_cases.FailureOracle: fail if mode/sidecar metadata is published without the matching payload state
kill_at_step_cases.GapReason: adb unavailable; external Android daemon/helper kill-at-step evidence remains planned-gap

kill_at_step_cases.ExpectedRecovery: lower entry remains visible unless a complete whiteout marker was published; partial markers are ignored
kill_at_step_cases.FailureOracle: fail if a partial whiteout hides a lower entry or survives as trusted state
kill_at_step_cases.GapReason: adb unavailable; external Android daemon/helper kill-at-step evidence remains planned-gap

kill_at_step_cases.ExpectedRecovery: payload tree remains authoritative and hardlink-ring cache is discarded/rebuilt if interrupted
kill_at_step_cases.FailureOracle: fail if corrupt/truncated ring cache is trusted instead of rebuilding from the payload tree
kill_at_step_cases.GapReason: adb unavailable; external Android daemon/helper kill-at-step evidence remains planned-gap

kill_at_step_cases.ExpectedRecovery: helper death cannot promote a partial hardlink-ring cache; restart rebuilds from payload tree
kill_at_step_cases.FailureOracle: fail if corrupt/truncated ring cache is trusted instead of rebuilding from the payload tree
kill_at_step_cases.GapReason: adb unavailable; external Android daemon/helper kill-at-step evidence remains planned-gap

negative_expected_conditions: success=true without adb/run-as checkpoint and kill evidence
HTTP or CLI acknowledgement without post-restart merged-view verification
partial .cow payload trusted as complete copy-up
partial rename, metadata, or whiteout stage accepted as committed state
corrupt or truncated hardlink-ring cache trusted instead of rebuilt
helper exit status alone treated as recovery proof
notes: adb unavailable; external Android daemon/helper kill-at-step evidence remains planned-gap
Non-passing artifacts are non-promoting and must not be counted as stable checkpoint evidence.

required_cases.ExpectedRecovery: old committed lower/upper view or a complete atomically published upper entry; no trusted .cow temp
destination is either the old committed file or the complete renamed file; no staged rename is trusted
mode/metadata state is atomic with payload state; metadata-only commits are rejected
lower entry remains visible unless a complete whiteout marker was published; partial markers are ignored
payload tree remains authoritative and hardlink-ring cache is discarded/rebuilt if interrupted
helper death cannot promote a partial hardlink-ring cache; restart rebuilds from payload tree
